summary: Completed frontend-only desktop and mobile testing on http://52.66.196.236 across login, phone auth modal, chat list/view, feed, AI hub, profile, and mobile bottom navigation. Core flows worked, but phone OTP request triggers reCAPTCHA challenge overlay that can block normal login progression until solved.

ui_bugs.issue: After tapping Request OTP, a reCAPTCHA challenge overlay appears and blocks subsequent normal login flow in the same session until challenge is completed.

integration_issues.issue: Console consistently logs 401 for /api/auth/me before authentication.

action_items: Improve phone OTP UX handling so reCAPTCHA challenge does not trap/block normal login flow after modal interaction.
Handle/suppress expected pre-login /api/auth/me 401 probe to reduce noisy console errors.
Fix chat bubble contrast class logic in ChatView for incoming messages: avoid using text-[#111B21] on dark bg-qc-bubble-other.
critical_code_review_comments: ChatView MessageBubble uses text-[#111B21] for both mine and other bubbles while --bubble-other is dark (#1a1a24), creating a high risk of unreadable incoming message text on dark bubble backgrounds.
Phone OTP request path can trigger reCAPTCHA challenge in a way that interrupts primary email/password login journey if user closes modal without completing challenge.
seed_data_creation: Sent test chat messages from demo user during desktop/mobile chat interaction checks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Used /app/memory/test_credentials.md demo account. Desktop and mobile core flows pass (login, chat, feed, AI, profile, bottom nav). Reproduce phone OTP issue by opening phone modal -> entering number -> tapping Request OTP; reCAPTCHA challenge appears and can block next login attempt in same run.
rca of the issue: RCA: Login interruption occurs when requestPhoneOtp() initializes Firebase signInWithPhoneNumber and mounts reCAPTCHA challenge; unresolved challenge overlays the page and prevents straightforward continuation with email/password login. Mitigation: isolate challenge inside modal lifecycle, ensure proper teardown/reset of verifier on modal close, and avoid blocking global login controls when phone flow is abandoned.
